questions.question: Explain the structure of a block in detail, including both header and body components.
keyPoints: Header: version, previous hash, Merkle root, timestamp, difficulty, nonce
Body: transaction count, transaction list, coinbase transaction

questions.question: Demonstrate how modifying a single block in the chain would be detected. Use an example.
keyPoints: Hash changes when block content changes
All subsequent blocks must be recalculated

questions.question: What is the Genesis Block? Explain its significance and special characteristics.
Compare block parameters of Bitcoin and Ethereum. Why do they differ?
keyPoints: Block size: Bitcoin ~1MB, Ethereum gas limit
